description: Stepper +/- buttons on /settings are w-7 h-7 (~28px), below the 44px WCAG 2.5.5 minimum touch target. Change spec cc-loop3-stepper-touch-targets is ready to implement (w-7 h-7 → w-11 h-11).
evidence: components/notifications/NotificationPreferencesPanel.tsx lines 112, 132 — both buttons use w-7 h-7
grounding: WCAG 2.5.5 (Target Size): interactive touch targets must be >= 44px. Nielsen H4 (Consistency and standards): iOS HIG and Material Design both specify 44pt/48dp minimum.

description: GanttChart.tsx is 827 lines — a good candidate for decomposition into DragBar, ZoomToolbar, MobileGanttView, and TaskDetailPanel sub-files.
evidence: components/schedule/GanttChart.tsx — 827 lines exceeds 300-line code quality threshold
grounding: Code quality baseline — large files are harder to review, test, and maintain. No user-facing impact; this is a maintainability improvement.
